manent social feeling" AMONG the
grocers.


The rrocers trust has been making
an illegal fight In using the boycott.
The members knew this and they
knew also that every member Of the
trust was liable personally to the
courts for the acts Of the organfxa-
,tion.


In order to relieve the individual
grocers from the fear Of being COM
PEELED to pay damages In case any
boycotted firm or grocer instituted
suit the trust has been incorporated.
OF the men who are the incorpor-
ators, c. F. siegier runs trust gro
Gerry at 1928 Second avenue. c. r.
Anderson's trust grocery IL at sol
Hogan street; p. Nelson offers gro
ceries at trust prices at o1730 Divis-
ion street; John clifford g. Son have
trust goods for sale at 1880 Broad
way: Eliza N. Cory IL the secretary
Of the association OF trust grocers.


It will be noticed that the big gro
GERS are not showing up in the Of
fetal positions Of the trust associa-
ton. The little fellows" have been
forced into these dangerous positions.
They will stand personal responsible
ity, but the big grocers will put up
the money for the trust fights.


As an incorporated body the trust
grocers are not now individually re-
sponsible for the law-breaking meth
DDS of the boycott. This Is the rea-
son the Spokane Grocers' association
was incorporated.


The Press believes the greedy oc-
topus which Is formed to grind still
harder the workingman and his fam
lv should be checked.
